hooks.command: find /Users/pablolires/Desktop/Code/app-ppa/.claude/worktrees -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d | while read -r wt; do [ ! -e "$wt/.env" ] && ln -sf /Users/pablolires/Desktop/Code/app-ppa/.env "$wt/.env"; [ ! -e "$wt/resources/images" ] && ln -sf /Users/pablolires/Desktop/Code/app-ppa/resources/images "$wt/resources/images"; done
